ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference designator for the component */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the component (e.g., resistance, capacitance) */,
  "footprint" TEXT /* Footprint specification for PCB layout */,
  "lcsc" TEXT /* LCSC part number for sourcing */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the inventory record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Warehouse location of the inventory item */,
  "bin_location" TEXT /* Bin location of the inventory item */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the component */,
  "minimum_stock" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level before reorder is triggered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the minimum */,
  "reorder_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for reordering (e.g., 20% of the minimum stock level) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the inventory record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exclusions" (
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exclusion record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the exclusion */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project for which the component is excluded */,
  "exclude_from_bom" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the component is excluded from BOM */,
  "exclude_from_pos" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the component is excluded from POS */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for excluding the component from BOM or POS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exclusions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sourcing" (
  "sourcing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sourcing record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being sourced */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the component */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the component */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the cost */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for sourcing the component */,
  "delivery_terms" TEXT /* Delivery terms for the component */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sourcing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sourcing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sourcing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sourcing_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sourcing_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, procurement, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that was modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made to the component or inventory record */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
